calibration_notes: My recent BEARISH intraday calls on SPY/QQQ have been accurate (3/3 correct) when VIX >25 and news sentiment is negative - maintaining this approach. However, I was wrong on NVDA next-day (predicted BEARISH, went UP) when ignoring massive institutional call buying - now weighing large premium flow more heavily. MU and GOOGL intraday misses occurred when I didn't account for sector rotation dynamics during market stress.
